name: cloud-risk-triage-agent-api
description: Autonomous cloud security posture sweep for Tenable Cloud Security via the public GraphQL API with a Bearer API token (no MCP connection). Two sections: Address critical findings (root MFA, third-party sensitive-data access, public exposure, exposed secrets) and Address low-hanging fruits (inactive identities, unused credentials, unused security groups), mapped to Findings. Always lists every check, marking empty results.
